chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

parts.text: 790 - وَ رَوَى زُرَارَةُ عَنْهُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

text: لَهُ: رَجُلٌ يَرَى اَلْعَقْرَبَ وَ اَلْأَفْعَى وَ اَلْحَيَّةَ وَ هُوَ يُصَلِّي أَ يَقْتُلُهَا قَالَ «نَعَمْ إِنْ شَاءَ فَعَلَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.790 – Zurarah narrated that a man asked him (Abu Ja'far (as)):
"If a person sees a scorpion, a snake, or a serpent while he is praying, should he kill it?"
Imam (as) said: "Yes, if he wishes to do so."
